overview: This fish appears to be a Common Bream (Abramis brama), a freshwater species native to Europe. It is characterized by a deep, laterally compressed body and silvery-bronze scales. Common Bream are known for producing a significant amount of protective slime. They typically inhabit slow-moving rivers, lakes, and canals. Wikipedia +3 4 sites Common bream - Wikipedia
